title: Looking Back on an Important Milestone in My AI Journey
snippet: I'm pleased to share that I successfully completed my 6-month AI/ML Internship at Alpha IT & Managed Services from June 2025 to January 2026.

title: Project Update: DepthVision
snippet: Today I completed the migration of my DepthVision project from a Streamlit-based prototype to a FastAPI-powered web application.
